targets.query:
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "soc_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_voltage_v" or r._field == "pv_target_voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_current_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load_current_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "internal_temp_c" or r._field == "external_temp_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "led_voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "led_current_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "led_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "daily_log")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ah_charge" or r._field == "ah_load")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["_field", "serial_number", "day_index"])

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "daily_log")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vbat_min_v" or r._field == "vbat_max_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["_field", "serial_number", "day_index"])

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "faults")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "faults")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "lvd_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "soc_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "internal_temp_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.serial_number, set: ${serial:json}))
  |> last()
